_about: Fallback pre-generated bio variants for first paint (and for when the live API fails). The live API at /bio is what runs once a user interacts with any dial. Fallback covers length only; model and vibe variation comes from live generation.

variants.short: I'm a Berlin-based design leader with fifteen years in complex B2B SaaS. Currently Head of Product Design at Bibel TV — redesigning the app, shifting the team toward user-centric thinking, and doing it hands-on with AI in the loop.
variants.long: I'm a Berlin-based design leader with fifteen years in complex B2B SaaS. Across four roles — Datameer, Ninox, ChurchDesk, Bibel TV — the work has been senior design leadership: shaping practice, hiring, design systems, governance with engineering. Currently at Bibel TV I'm redesigning the mobile app and bringing more user-centric thinking to the existing team (research cadence, A/B testing, behavioral design), alongside a cross-platform design-token API and an in-house Color Lab. Hands-on with AI too — vibe-coding onboarding at Ninox with the founders, a Copilot skill at Bibel TV, and agentic prototyping where Figma plus Claude Code becomes a working prototype the same week engineering needs it.
